tagline: Family-owned Santa Rosa roofers with nearly two decades of residential and commercial roofing experience.
seoDescription: Titan Roofing and Construction in Santa Rosa, CA. Licensed roof repair, replacement, gutters and inspections. Call (707) 495-8685.
heroSubheading: Licensed and experienced roof repair and replacement for homes and businesses across Santa Rosa, with free estimates and honest, dependable work.
aboutBody: Titan Roofing and Construction is a locally owned Santa Rosa roofing company led by owner Abel Jimenez. With nearly two decades of hands-on roofing experience, the team handles everything from simple leak repairs to full residential and commercial roof replacements.

The company's goal is to be Santa Rosa's most reliable and respected roofing contractor by delivering quality workmanship and building lasting relationships. Every project is guided by honesty, integrity, and a focus on complete customer satisfaction, from the first inspection to the final walkthrough.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete removal and installation of a new roofing system, with your property protected throughout the project.

services.title: Roof Repair & Leak Detection
services.description: Skilled repair of shingle and tile damage, leaks, and skylight issues before they turn into costly problems.

services.title: Commercial Roofing
services.description: Repair and replacement services for commercial buildings throughout the Santa Rosa area.

services.title: Roof Inspections & Maintenance
services.description: Thorough inspections and ongoing maintenance to catch issues early and extend the life of your roof.

services.title: Gutters
services.description: Installation, replacement, repair, and cleaning of gutters to keep water moving away from your home.

services.title: Insurance Claim Assistance
services.description: Help managing storm damage claims from wind, hail, or fallen branches from start to finish.

testimonials.quote: I highly recommend Titan Roofing based on the top notch job they did on time and on budget on my own house.
testimonials.author: Chris P.

testimonials.quote: Abel owns Titan Roofing, and he immediately made me feel comfortable. I could sense his integrity and honesty.
testimonials.author: B. K.

notes: Owner: Abel Jimenez (legal entity Larke Construction Inc DBA Titan Roofing and Construction). Address: 4589 Arlington Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95407. CSLB license #769821, active, expires 12/31/2026. BBB lists established 1999 (A+ rating, not accredited); the website states 'almost two decades of experience.' Used Est. 1999 per BBB. Ratings conflict across sources: Angi 4.9/5, Birdeye 3.8/5 (10 reviews) — used Angi value with Birdeye/Birdeye review count of 10; treat rating as approximate. Also has X/Twitter: x.com/titanroofingca. No financing or specific warranty terms confirmed on site. Email abel@titanroofer.com provided in brief but not shown on website. Only three real (non-logo) job photos exist on the site.
